memories.content:
## BBS test board cleanup: explicit deletion approved

User encountered BBS board startup error after stopping wgserv residuals. Explicitly approved deletion of the test board directory (`C:\BBSV10`) since:
- It's a test board (not production)
- Clean backup exists at `C:\docs\BBSV10`
- User noted the clean backup might have original DAT file vs DAT→SQLite migration state

Fallback plan: restore by copying (not moving) from `C:\docs\BBSV10` to `C:\BBSV10`.
